_comment_top: R6 task 105 (D-H-05, FR-13) — seed row for the EntityExtractorHandler typed handler (LLM-assisted NER).
_comment_routing: Runtime invocation routes to the C# class via sprk_handlerclass = 'EntityExtractorHandler' (= nameof handler class).
_comment_consumption: Read by scripts/Seed-TypedHandlers.ps1. Idempotent — script queries by sprk_toolcode first; UPSERTs.
_comment_toolcode: R6 audit item 4 (2026-06-07): sprk_toolcode column extended manually from 10 to 100 chars. Renamed from 'ENT-EXT@v1' to descriptive 'ENTITY-EXTRACTOR'. NO @v1 suffix per cross-environment migration policy.
sprk_description: LLM-assisted Named Entity Recognition (NER) with code-based validation + normalization. Extracts organizations, persons, locations, dates, money, emails, phone numbers, and URLs from free text. Configurable type filter (entityTypes) and confidence threshold (confidenceThreshold). Output entities are deterministically validated + normalized (ISO 8601 dates, lowercased emails, sanitized phones, uppercase currency codes).
_comment_availableincontexts: 100000002 = Both (Playbook + Chat). FR-13 acceptance: invocable from both playbook orchestration and chat-driven function calling.

sprk_jsonschema.title: EntityExtractorHandler Request
sprk_jsonschema.description: Argument shape for chat-driven invocation of EntityExtractorHandler. The 'text' field carries the input to scan for entities; optional 'entityTypes' and 'confidenceThreshold' override the row's default configuration for a single invocation.

text.description: Free-text input to scan for entities. The handler extracts every recognizable entity matching the configured types and returns structured + normalized output.

entityTypes.description: Optional subset of entity types to extract. When omitted, all supported types are extracted.

confidenceThreshold.description: Optional override for the minimum LLM confidence to include in results (0.0-1.0). Defaults to 0.6 if omitted.

sprk_configuration._comment: Default configuration. Per-invocation tool args / playbook config may override entityTypes / confidenceThreshold / modelDeployment per row.

_comment_configuration: entityTypes lists all 8 supported types; restrict to subset for finer-grained playbook workflows (e.g., contracts → ['organization','person','date','money']). confidenceThreshold = 0.6 balances precision vs. recall; raise to 0.8+ for high-stakes flows. modelDeployment intentionally OMITTED — defaults to ModelSelectorOptions.ToolHandlerModel (gpt-4o-mini).
